documentation.text:
@dev Returns all medical records for a patient.
 - Patient can always read their own records
 - Admin can read any patient records
 - Doctors can read if they have a valid AccessNFT consent

addMedicalRecord(uint256,string,string,s.details: Add a full medical record for a completed appointment. Stores structured diagnosis, prescription text, and an IPFS hash pointing to any attached report file.

addPatientRecord(string,string).details: Patient uploads their own past medical record to IPFS and logs it.

getRecords(address).details: Returns all medical records for a patient. - Patient can always read their own records - Admin can read any patient records - Doctors can read if they have a valid AccessNFT consent
